result: {"schema_version": 1, "pass": false, "review_status": "completed", "summary": "shell=True 搭配未驗證路徑存在 injection 風險，rm -rf 無確認機制", "issues": [{"severity": "critical", "confidence": "high", "category": "security", "file": "scripts/cleanup.py", "line_hint": "L6", "check": "subprocess.run() 以 shell=True 執行包含 glob 的字串命令", "verdict": "shell=True 讓命令字串經由 sh 解析，若路徑任何部分來自外部輸入則可 injection；即使此處為硬編碼，shell=True 是不必要的攻擊面擴大", "fix": "改用 list 形式並移除 shell=True：subprocess.run(['rm', '-rf', '/tmp/app-cache/'], check=True)"},{"severity": "critical", "confidence": "high", "category": "correctness", "file": "scripts/cleanup.py", "line_hint": "L6", "check": "rm -rf /tmp/app-cache/* 為不可逆操作，無任何前置確認或路徑驗證", "verdict": "若 /tmp/app-cache 為符號連結或路徑被竄改，會遞迴刪除非預期目錄；check=True 只捕捉非零退出碼，不保護誤刪", "fix": "刪除前驗證路徑是否為預期目錄（os.path.realpath 比對），或改用 shutil.rmtree('/tmp/app-cache', ignore_errors=False) 並明確指定絕對路徑變數"}]}
